calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC's Petition/Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: John K. Stewart; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/JKS)
